title: Will Europe's pressure on Israel make a difference for Palestinians?В
summary: Traditional allies are putting pressure on Israel. The UK has paused trade talks and sanctioned West Bank settlers. And the EU is threatening to review its entire relationship with Israel. Is this a turning point in international policy? And will it make any difference for Palestinians?В   In this episode:В    James Moran, Former EU Ambassador to Egypt and Jordan. Yossi Mekelberg, Senior Consulting Fellow, Chatham House. Zaid Belbagi, Managing Partner, Hardcastle Advisory.В   Host: Folly Bah Thibault  Connect with us:@AJEPodcasts onВ Twitter,В Instagram,В Facebook

title: Et maintenant...le retour du bagne ? - L'intГ©grale -
summary: C dans lвҖҷair du 21 mai 2025 : Le retour du bagne ?Dans les colonnes du Journal du dimanche, le ministre de la Justice a Г©voquГ© samedi sa volontГ© de crГ©er un quartier de haute sГ©curitГ© au sein de la future prison de Saint-Laurent-du-Maroni en Guyane afin de "mettre hors dвҖҷГ©tat de nuire les profils les plus dangereux du narcotrafic". Sur les 495 places prГ©vues dans cette future prison, 60 seront rГ©servГ©es Г  des pontes du narcotrafic, a indiquГ© le garde des Sceaux, et "quinze places" seront "dГ©diГ©es aux islamistes/ radicalisГ©s" condamnГ©s pour terrorisme djihadiste, un profil de dГ©tenu inexistant en Guyane. De quoi laisser entendre que certains pourraient ГӘtre transfГ©rГ©s depuis lвҖҷHexagone. Plusieurs Г©lus locaux et la collectivitГ© territoriale de Guyane ont alors dГ©noncГ© un projet Г©voquant un "retour du bagne" Г  Saint-Laurent-du-Maroni, deuxiГЁme ville de dГ©partement amazonien et ex-colonie pГ©nitentiaire. Face Г  la levГ©e de boucliers qui a suivi ses premiГЁres dГ©clarations, GГ©rald Darmanin a prГ©cisГ© lundi que ce quartier de haute sГ©curitГ©, le troisiГЁme de ce type annoncГ© en France pour accueillir les prisonniers les plus dangereux, nвҖҷaurait pas vocation Г  accueillir des dГ©tenus venus de lвҖҷHexagone.Un dГ©but de polГ©mique qui survient alors que le secteur pГ©nitentiaire est secouГ© par de nombreux dГ©bats et inquiГ©tudes, sur fond de surpopulation carcГ©rale. 82 921 dГ©tenus sont actuellement recensГ©s dans les prisons franГ§aises pour 62 358 places, soit une densitГ© carcГ©rale qui dГ©passe les 150 %. ГҖ ce sujet, la semaine derniГЁre, Emmanuel Macron sвҖҷest dit ouvert Г  la location de places de prison Г  lвҖҷГ©tranger. Dans son dernier rapport d'activitГ© annuel, publiГ© ce 21 mai, la contrГҙleuse gГ©nГ©rale des lieux de privation de libertГ© (CGLPL) dГ©nonce un "dГ©laissement coupable" Г  tous les niveaux et Г©trille certaines dГ©cisions du garde des Sceaux. "Je parle d'un Гүtat qui abandonne Г  la fois, ses dГ©tenus et ses fonctionnaires" affirme Dominique Simonnot qui sвҖҷindigne du niveau de surpopulation carcГ©rale et dвҖҷun manque de surveillants.Selon la contrГҙleuse gГ©nГ©rale des lieux de privation de libertГ©, il manque 7 000 gardiens de prison. Mais le secteur pГ©nitentiaire peine Г  recruter de nouveaux agents alors que ceux en poste sвҖҷinquiГЁtent dвҖҷune dГ©gradation de leur sГ©curitГ© au sein des Г©tablissements mais aussi Г  lвҖҷextГ©rieur, aprГЁs la sГ©rie dвҖҷattaques menГ©e depuis mi-avril contre des prisons, des agents de l'administration pГ©nitentiaire, leurs domiciles et leurs vГ©hicules.ParallГЁlement un conseil de DГ©fense a lieu ce mercredi 21 mai, avec au menu, un rapport des renseignements Г©valuant la lutte contre le "sГ©paratisme islamiste". LвҖҷElysГ©e envisage de nouvelles mesures pour lutter contre "lвҖҷentrisme islamiste".Alors quelle est la situation dans les prisons franГ§aises ? Quel est le projet envisagГ© par le ministre de la Justice en Guyane ? Que contient le rapport des renseignements, au cЕ“ur du conseil de dГ©fense ?  LES EXPERTS :- Christophe BARBIER - Гүditorialiste politique, conseiller de la rГ©daction - Franc-Tireur - Alain BAUER - Professeur de criminologie вҖ“ CNAM- Mathieu DELAHOUSSE - Grand reporter - Le Nouvel Obs - Evelyne SIRE-MARIN - Magistrate honoraire, vice-prГ©sidente de la Ligue des Droits de lвҖҷHomme  рҹҺҷпёҸ Retrouvez C dans l'air en vidГ©o sur franceВ·tv : https://www.france.tv/france-5/c-dans-l-air/     DistribuГ© par Audiomeans. Visitez audiomeans.fr/politique-de-confidentialite pour plus d'informations.

title: бһ–бһҸбҹҢбһҳбһ¶бһ“бһ”бҹ’бһҡбһ…бһ¶бҹҶбһҗбҹ’бһ„бҹғбһ“бҹғбһҹбһ¶бһҡбһ–бҹҗбһҸбҹҢбһҳбһ¶бһ“ бһҢбһ№ бһҒбҹҒбһҳбһ”бһјбһҢбһ¶ бһҠбҹҒбһӣбһёбһҹбһҳбҹ’бһҡбһ¶бһ”бҹӢбһҡбһ¶бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһёбһҗбҹ’бһ„бҹғбһ‘бһёбҹўбҹ  бһҒбҹӮбһ§бһҹбһ—бһ¶ бһҶбҹ’бһ“бһ¶бҹҶбҹўбҹ бҹўбҹҘ
summary: бҹЎ) бһҖбҹ’бһҡбһҹбһҪбһ„бһҖбһ¶бһҡбһ„бһ¶бһҡбһўбҹҶбһ–бһ¶бһңбһ“бһ¶бһңбһұбҹ’бһҷ бһҖбһҳбҹ’бһҳбһҖбһҡбһҡбҹ„бһ„бһ…бһҖбҹ’бһҡ бһҒбһӣбҹҗбһҡбһҹбҹ’бһҸбһ¶бһҡ (Color Star) бһҡбһ„бҹӢбһ…бһ¶бҹҶбһҖбһ¶бһҡбһҠбҹ„бҹҮбһҹбҹ’бһҡбһ¶бһҷбһҡбһ”бһҹбҹӢбһҖбҹ’бһҡбһҹбһҪбһ„бһҮбһ¶бһҳбһҪбһҷбһҖбҹ’бһҡбһ»бһҳбһ бҹҠбһ»бһ“бҹ” бҹў) бһ”бһҖбҹ’бһҹбһҖбҹ’бһҡбҹ…бһҡбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһ¶бһ—бһ·бһ”бһ¶бһӣбһҮбҹҶбһҡбһ»бһүбһұбҹ’бһҷ бһӣбҹ„бһҖ бһ бҹҠбһ»бһ“ бһҳбҹүбһ¶бһҺбҹӮбһҸ бһ”бһүбҹ’бһҮбһјбһ“вҖӢбһўбһ“бһ»бһҹбһүбҹ’бһүбһ¶вҖӢбһўбһ„бҹ’бһӮбһҖбһ¶бһҡбһҹбһ бһ”бҹ’бһҡбһҮбһ¶бһҮбһ¶бһҸбһ·бһҹбҹ’бһҸбһёбһ–бһёбһ…бҹ’бһ”бһ¶бһ”бҹӢбһҹбһҳбһ»бһ‘бҹ’бһҡбһ‘бҹ…бһҡбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһҹбһ—бһ¶бһ•бҹ’бһҸбһӣбҹӢвҖӢбһҹбһ…бҹ’бһ…бһ¶бһ”бҹҗбһ“бһұбҹ’бһҷбһ”бһ¶бһ“бһҶбһ¶бһ”бҹӢбҹ” бҹЈ) вҖӢбһӣбҹ„бһҖ бһ бҹҠбһ»бһ“ бһҹбҹӮбһ“бҹ– бһҠбһҫбһҳбҹ’бһ”бһёбһҖбһ»бҹҶбһұбҹ’бһҷбһҡбһ”бһ”бһ”бҹ’бһҡбһӣбҹҗбһҷ бһ–бһјбһҮбһҹбһ¶бһҹбһ“бҹҚбһңбһ·бһӣвҖӢбһҸбҹ’бһҡбһЎбһ”бҹӢбһҳбһҖбһңбһ·бһүбһ–бһӣбһҡбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһҒбҹ’бһҳбҹӮбһҡбһӮбҹ’бһҡбһ”бҹӢбһҡбһјбһ”бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһ…бһјбһӣбһҡбһҪбһҳбһҗбҹӮбһҡбһҖбҹ’бһҹбһ¶бһҖбһ¶бһҡбһ–бһ¶бһҡбһҹбһ“бҹ’бһҸбһ·бһ—бһ¶бһ–бҹ” бҹӨ) бһҳбһҮбҹ’бһҲбһҳбһҺбҹ’бһҢбһӣвҖӢбһҹбһҳбҹ’бһҡбһ¶бһ”бҹӢбһҖбһ¶бһҡвҖӢбһҹбһ·бһҖбҹ’бһҹбһ¶вҖӢбһўбһ“бҹ’бһҸбһҡбһҮбһ¶бһҸбһ·вҖӢбһ“бһ·бһ„бһҷбһ»бһ‘бҹ’бһ’бһҹбһ¶бһҹбҹ’бһҸбҹ’бһҡвҖӢбһҡбһ”бһҹбҹӢвҖӢбһўбһ¶бһҳбҹҒбһҡбһ·бһҖбһҡбһҖбһғбһҫбһүбһҗбһ¶бҹ– бһ…бһ·бһ“бһҖбҹҶбһ–бһ»бһ„бһҖбһ¶бһ“бҹӢбһҖбһ¶бһ”бҹӢбһ•бҹ’бһҸбһ¶бһ…бҹӢвҖӢбһҳбһ»бһҒвҖӢбһҖбһ“бҹ’бһӣбҹӮбһ„бһҒбҹ’бһӣбҹҮбһ“бҹғбһҳбһјбһӣбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһ¶бһ“вҖӢбһҖбһ„бһ‘бҹҗбһ–вҖӢбһҮбһҫбһ„вҖӢбһ‘бһ№бһҖвҖӢбһҹбһҳбһ»бһ‘бҹ’бһҡбһҡбһ¶бһҳбһҡбһ”бһҹбҹӢбһҒбҹ’бһҳбҹӮбһҡбҹ” вҖӢ бҹҘ) бһ–бһјбһ‘бһёбһ“бһ“бҹ…бһҸбҹӮбһ”бһ“бҹ’бһҸбһ…бҹ’бһҡбһ¶бһ“бһ…бҹ„бһӣбһ”бһ‘бһҲбһ”бҹӢбһ”бһ¶бһүбҹӢбһ”бһҫбһўбҹҠбһ»бһҷбһҖбҹ’бһҡбҹӮбһ“бһҳбһ·бһ“вҖӢбһ–бҹ’бһҡбһҳбһҠбһҖвҖӢбһ‘бҹҗбһ–бһ…бҹҒбһүбһ–бһёвҖӢбһҸбҹҶбһ”бһ“бҹӢбһҠбҹӮбһӣбһҡбһ»бһҹбҹ’бһҹбҹҠбһёбһҖбһ¶бһ“бҹӢбһҖбһ¶бһ”бҹӢбҹ”

В  Economy Leftist British PM Keir Starmer BETRAYS Brexit, Causes Alarm by Signing Agreement With European Union Making HUGE Concessions  	В  Prime Minister, Keir Starmer, has just betrayed Brexit вҖ“ and may have dealt a death blow to the islandвҖҷs fishing industry.  	ThereвҖҷs widespread alarm over the terms of the вҖҳresetвҖҷ deal with the European Union and the huge concessions that he made.  	At a press conference alongside European Commission chief Ursula von der Leyen, Keir Starmer says he is вҖҳmoving onвҖҷ from вҖҳBrexit battlesвҖҷ, and that this deal will put Britain вҖҳback on the world stageвҖҷ. The move follows a sweeping stimulus package announced earlier this month.  	The PeopleвҖҷs Bank of China (PBOC) has lowered its benchmark lending rates for the first time in seven months as part of ongoing efforts to mitigate the impact of US tariffs on its economy. title: EU plans fee on cheap Chinese parcels
summary: The EU plans a вӮ¬2 fee on cheap parcels from China, hitting companies like Temu and Shein. We hear from the Chief Executive of the European Consumer Association. Syria has a chance to reboot its economy as the EU lifts some sanctions. We hear from Syrian businesses on what this second chance could mean for them. And Devina Gupta finds out how the worldвҖҷs largest maker of electric vehicle batteries has had the biggest stock market listing of the year.

title: EU to launch trade review with Israel as Gaza crisis escalates
summary: Tony Connolly, Europe Editor for RTГү News; Padraig OвҖҷSullivan, Fianna Fail TD for Cork North Central; Nessa Cosgrove, Labour Senator; Claire Kerrane, Sinn FГ©in TD for Roscommon-Galway; Sarah McGuinness, Political Correspondent with the Irish Daily Mail

title: John Campbell to the rescue! (The UK/EU deal explained)
summary: Will food prices come down? Will there be changes in migration? Can we buy more plants? And what of the ВЈ200 million spent on brand new port facilities in NI after Brexit? In other words, what will the new EU/UK deal mean for Northern Ireland? Our Economics and Business Editor John Campbell give Tara Mills and Declan Harvey the lowdown on what all of this means for us.  Also on todayвҖҷs episode: -	Does John have a photographic memory? -	TaraвҖҷs days writing for Ceefax  -	Did Declan break the law?  Get in touch: thestateofus@bbc.co.uk

title: Brexit is dead. Long live the future
summary: The Matts are on something of a high. This weekвҖҷs EU deal suddenly feels much more consequential than theyвҖҷd expected. Credit (for once) to Starmer вҖҰ even in his technocratic monotone, he presided over a clear vibe shift in the UKвҖҷs relationship with the EU. No, it doesnвҖҷt go nearly far enough. No, itвҖҷs not rejoin. But yes вҖҰ itвҖҷs a new pathway and it feels like we have, finally, a PM willing to start fixing the mess of the last 9 years. The hard yards start now, but at least we can be confident that weвҖҷve won the argument, Brexit is definitively a dud, and the future beckons. Enjoy. EXCLUSIVE OFFER: Get The New European for just ВЈ1 for the first month. Head toВ theneweuropean.co.uk/2matts  Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: Tories Sink In The Polls
summary: The Tories have fallen to fourth place in the latest Times/YouGov poll - behind the Liberal Democrats for the first time in six years. Plus, Keir Starmer might've landed his EU reset deal, but Boris Johnson has labelled him the 'orange-ball chewing gimp of Brussels'. Hugo Rifkind unpacks the politics of the day with Janice Turner and James Marriott.  Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: бһ–бһҸбҹҢбһҳбһ¶бһ“бһ”бҹ’бһҡбһ…бһ¶бҹҶбһҗбҹ’бһ„бҹғбһ“бҹғбһҹбһ¶бһҡбһ–бҹҗбһҸбҹҢбһҳбһ¶бһ“ бһҢбһ№ бһҒбҹҒбһҳбһ”бһјбһҢбһ¶ бһҠбҹҒбһӣбһёбһҹбһҳбҹ’бһҡбһ¶бһ”бҹӢбһҡбһ¶бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһёбһҗбҹ’бһ„бҹғбһ‘бһёбҹЎбҹ© бһҒбҹӮбһ§бһҹбһ—бһ¶ бһҶбҹ’бһ“бһ¶бҹҶбҹўбҹ бҹўбҹҘ
summary: бҹЎ) вҖӢвҖӢбһўбҹ’бһ“бһҖбһғбҹ’бһӣбһ¶бҹҶбһҳбһҫбһӣбҹ–бһ”бһҫбһҹбһҳбһҷбһ»бһ‘бҹ’бһ’бһ“бһ¶бһӮбһҳбһ¶бһҹбһҠбһҫбһҡбһ бһҪбһҹбһ–бһёвҖӢбһӮбҹ„бһӣбһҖбһ¶бһҡбһҺбҹҚвҖӢбһўбһ¶бһ–бҹ’бһҷбһ¶бһҖбҹ’бһҡбһ№бһҸбһ“бһ№бһ„бһ“бһ¶бҹҶбһ‘бһ»бһҖбҹ’бһҒбһҠбһ¶бһҖбҹӢбһҒбҹ’бһӣбһҪбһ“бҹ” бҹў) вҖӢ бһўбһ¶бһҮбҹ’бһүбһ¶бһ’бһҡвҖӢ бһ“бһ№бһ„бһ”бҹҶбһ–бһ¶бһҖбҹӢбһ”бһ“бҹ’бһҗбҹӮбһҳбһ§бһ”бһҖбһҡбһҺбҹҚбһҖбһ¶бһҡбһ–бһ¶бһҡбһҡбһ“бҹ’бһ‘бҹҮбһ“бҹ…бһҸбһ¶бһҳвҖӢбһ”бҹ’бһҡбһ¶бһҹбһ¶бһ‘вҖӢбһ”бһ“бҹ’бһ‘бһ¶бһ”бҹӢвҖӢбһ–бһёбһҳбһ¶бһ“бһ”бһ¶бһҸбһ»бһ—бһјбһҸбһҡбһ“бҹ’бһ‘бҹҮбһ”бһ¶бһүбҹӢбһ”бһҺбҹ’бһҠбһ¶бһӣбһұбҹ’бһҷбһҳбһ“бһ»бһҹбҹ’бһҹбһҹбҹ’бһӣбһ¶бһ”бҹӢбҹ” бҹЈ) вҖӢ бһ”бһҖбҹ’бһҹбһ”бҹ’бһҡбһҶбһ¶бҹҶбһ„бһҹбҹ’бһ“бһҫбһұбҹ’бһҷ бһӣбҹ„бһҖ бһ бҹҠбһ»бһ“ бһҳбҹүбһ¶бһҺбҹӮбһҸ бһҠбһ¶бһҖбҹӢбһҹбҹҶбһҺбһҫбһ‘бҹ…бһҡбһҠбҹ’бһӢвҖӢбһҹбһ—бһ¶вҖӢбһ’бҹ’бһңбһҫбһҹбһ…бҹ’бһ…бһ¶бһ”бҹҗбһ“бһӣбһҫбһ…бҹ’бһ”бһ¶бһ”бҹӢбһҹбһҳбһ»бһ‘бҹ’бһҡбҹ” бҹӨ) вҖӢ бһӣбҹ„бһҖ бһ бҹҠбһ»бһ“ бһҳбҹүбһ¶бһҺбҹӮбһҸбһўбҹҶбһ–бһ¶бһңбһ“бһ¶бһңбһұбҹ’бһҷ бһ–бһӣбһҡбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһҒбҹ’бһҳбҹӮбһҡбһ…бһјбһӣбһҡбһҪбһҳвҖӢбһҗбҹӮвҖӢбһҡбһҖбҹ’бһҹбһ¶вҖӢбһҹбһ“бҹ’бһҸбһ·бһ—бһ¶бһ–бһҠбһҫбһҳбҹ’бһ”бһёбһҖбһ»бҹҶбһұбҹ’бһҷбһҡбһ”бһ”бһ”бҹ’бһҡбһӣбҹҗбһҷ бһ–бһјбһҮбһҹбһ¶бһҹбһ“бҹҚбһңбһ·бһӣбһҳбһҖбһңбһ·бһүбҹ” бҹҘ) вҖӢ HRW бһҗбһ¶ бһҮбһ”бҹүбһ»бһ“бһҳбһ·бһ“бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһјбһңбһўбҹ„бһ”бһҠбҹғбһҲбһҳбһҫбһӣвҖӢбһҡбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһ¶бһ—бһ·бһ”бһ¶бһӣбһҖбһҳбҹ’бһ–бһ»бһҮбһ¶бһ”бһ“бҹ’бһҸвҖӢвҖӢбһҖбҹҖбһ”бһҹбһ„бҹ’бһҖбһҸбҹӢ бһ“бһ·бһ„бһҡбҹҶбһӣбҹ„бһ—вҖӢбһҹбһ·бһ‘бҹ’бһ’бһ·бһҳбһ“бһ»бһҹбҹ’бһҹбһҸбһ¶бһҳбһ‘бҹҶбһ“бһҫбһ„бһ…бһ·бһҸбҹ’бһҸбһ‘бҹҖбһҸбһ“бҹ„бҹҮбһ‘бҹҒбҹ” бҹҰ) бһҖбҹ’бһҡбҹ„бһҷбһ–бһёбһ…бһҡбһ…бһ¶вҖӢбһ”бһҡбһ¶бһҮбҹҗбһҷ бһҠбһ¶бһҺбһәбһҳбҹүбһ¶бһҖбһ•бҹ’бһҸбһӣбҹӢбһҮбҹҶбһ“бһҪбһҷбһҷбҹ„бһ’бһ¶ бҹҰбҹ бҹ бһӣбһ¶бһ“вҖӢбһҠбһ»бһӣбҹ’бһӣбһ¶бһҡбһҒбһҺбҹҲбһўбҹҠбһёбһҸбһ¶бһӣбһёбһ”бһүбҹ’бһҮбһјбһ“бһҡбһҗбһ–бһ¶бһҹбһҠбҹӮбһҖбһ…бҹҶбһ“бһҪбһ“бҹӨбҹ бҹ бһӮбҹ’бһҡбһҝбһ„бһ‘бҹ…бһұбҹ’бһҷбһўбҹҠбһ»бһҷбһҖбҹ’бһҡбҹӮбһ“бҹ”

title: 21. It's All About EU
summary: Iain and Tessa talk the government's new deal with the EU - what will it mean for fish, young people and passport gates?! They also digest the new Romanian president and discuss Gary Lineker leaving the BBC. Send your questions and voice notes to 07557 187929 or wherepoliticsmeetshistory@global.com. Stay connected with us on Instagram @WherePoliticsMeetsHistory and on X @WherePolitics. You can also follow @IainDale and @DrTessaDunlop.

title: Breakfast Wrap: Why Europe wants closer defence ties with Australia
summary: There's momentum for closer trade ties with Europe but the prime minister has been cautious about a proposal from the European Union to enter into a defence and security pact. European Commission president Ursula von der Leyen pitched the idea to Anthony Albanese during their meeting in Rome in the context of what she describes as "massively increased" geopolitical tensions. Recap the morning's news, politics and global affairs with the Breakfast Wrap

title: From fishing to food exports: What's the UK's deal with the EU?
summary: The UK and the EU have reached a new deal setting out post-Brexit relations on areas including fishing rights, trade and defence. We hear from the Irish fishing community, a food exporter in the UK and what a "youth experience scheme" could mean for businesses in France. Also, Andrew Peach finds out how one of the most important companies in the world is helping shape the future of the global economy.
